# Navigation Source Polish v41 · GitHub Web UI Guide

1. Download the v41 overlay ZIP.
2. Unzip it locally.
3. Open `https://github.com/MontrealAI/goalos-agijobmanager-ascension`.
4. Click **Add file → Upload files**.
5. Drag in the **contents** of the unzipped overlay.
6. Commit directly to `main` with: `Add Navigation Source Polish v41`.
7. Open **Actions**.
8. Run **GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Navigation Source Polish Publisher v41**.
9. Use `deploy_pages=true`, `commit_generated_source=true`, `run_live_factual_check=false`, and `strict_live_factual_check=false`.
10. Verify the live homepage and `production-url.json`.
